_comment: Curated resource directory shown on the Resources page (native + web). Each category has parallel real_resources (Real mode) and sim_resources (Sim mode) lists. The page shows real_resources; an 'All' view lists every category at once. Extend by appending categories or links, no code change required. URLs starting with '#' are in-app anchors, not external links. Ordered to lead with the self-sufficiency essentials (water, energy, food, shelter) the mission is built on.

real_resources.title: EPA Drinking Water
real_resources.description: Water safety, testing, and private-well guidance from the EPA.

real_resources.description: Safe water, storage, and emergency disinfection from the CDC.
